performance_overview: First completed trade recorded today (2026-06-04): MPC, a loss, so the book is 0W/1L (0% win rate, avg -0.61% per trade) — far too small a sample to draw signal conclusions. Today's account P&L was -$9.79 (-0.01%) vs SPY +0.46%, alpha -0.47% on the day. Since inception (2026-06-01) cumulative Bull is -0.01% vs SPY -0.11%, so the strategy is fractionally ahead of SPY cumulatively but both are essentially flat; the prior three sessions were no-trade/flat, this is the first day capital was actually deployed.
overnight_hold_insights: Still zero overnight holds completed. The first live position (MPC) was evaluated at EOD and CLOSED before the bell: it failed two safe-hold gates — not profitable (close 268.14 < entry 269.65, -0.56%) and trailing stop never activated (price never reached the +1.5-ATR trail trigger ~269.98 on a very low-ATR name). Net realized -0.61%. No gap-risk data yet. Continue applying the config safe-hold criteria; the lesson so far is that very low-ATR, tight-stop entries that don't move within the session correctly get closed rather than carried.

notes_for_next_session:
